summary: Iteration 5 frontend testing completed successfully. All 12 requested visual changes verified and passing: (1) Hero image replaced with Evandro-nobg.png, (2) Logo carousel squares have #DBDBDB gray background, (3) Institution grid squares have #DBDBDB gray background, (4) Experience carousel includes Dunbar Rovers FC photo and caption, (5) Header navigation shows 'Aulas Gravadas', (6) Footer links show 'Aulas Gravadas', (7) 'Aulas Gravadas' nav link navigates to /curso-psicologia-processos-basicos correctly, (8) Programa Cérebro page has 'Bônus Exclusivo' section with book cover, (9) Book cover links to Amazon (https://a.co/d/01aO55XF), (10) All pages render without errors, (11) 10% OFF popup appears and can be dismissed, (12) WhatsApp CTA buttons link correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All data is MOCKED - no real backend implementation
Contact form submission shows toast but doesn't actually send data
Login form is non-functional (just shows toast, no actual authentication)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 testing completed. All 5 visual changes verified: (1) Hero image is Evandro-nobg.png showing two people with trophies, (2) Logo carousel squares have #DBDBDB light gray background, (3) Institution grid squares have #DBDBDB light gray background, (4) Dunbar Rovers FC photo added to experience carousel (index 2 in carouselImages array), (5) Nav link renamed from 'Curso Psicologia e Processos Básicos' to 'Aulas Gravadas' in both Header and Footer, (6) Bonus book section added to Programa Cérebro page with clickable Amazon cover. All pages render correctly: /, /servicos, /programa-cerebro-alta-performance, /livros, /curso-psicologia-processos-basicos, /login, /contato. Popup and WhatsApp functionality working.
